debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
Y : Set α
inst✝ : G.Finite
⊢ 2 * @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G ≤ G.vertexSet.encard + Y.encard - encard (@Graph.OddComponents α β (G - Y))

failed_attempts: exact le_of_eq (by simp)

simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, sub_eq_add_neg, add_sub_assoc] using
    (tutte_berge_of_maximal_vertexDelete (G := G) (X := Y)
      (by
        classical
        simpa using (maximal_iff_forall_not.2 (by
          intro Z hZ hYZ
          exact False.elim (by
            have := hYZ.1
            exact this.elim)) ))
    : 2 * ν(G - Y) = (V(G) \ Y).encard - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard) ▸
    (by
      classical
      have hmono : ν(G) ≤ ν(G - Y) + Y.encard := by
        -- removing vertices destroys at most |Y| edges of a matching
        sorry
      have hbound : 2 * ν(G - Y) ≤ (V(G) \ Y).encard - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
        exact le_of_eq (tutte_berge_of_maximal_vertexDelete (G := G) (X := Y)
          (by
            classical
            simpa using (maximal_iff_forall_not.2 (by
              intro Z hZ hYZ
              exact False.elim (by
                have := hYZ.1
                exact this.elim)) )))
      -- combine inequalities
      sorry)

by_contra hle
  have hlt :
      (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard < 2 * ν(G) := by
    exact lt_of_not_ge hle
  have hmax : Maximal (fun X ↦ ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard) (∅ : Set α) := by
    refine ⟨by simp, ?_⟩
    intro Z hZ hne
    have : ν(G - Z) ≠ ν(G) - Z.encard := by
      simpa [hZ] using hne
    exact this
  have := tutte_berge_of_maximal_vertexDelete (G := G) (X := (∅ : Set α)) hmax
  simp at this
  have hge : (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard ≥ 2 * ν(G) := by
    simpa [this] using le_of_eq this
  exact (not_lt_of_ge hge) hlt

by_cases hY : Y ⊆ V(G)
  ·
    have hmax : ∃ X, Maximal (fun X ↦ ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard) X ∧ Y ⊆ X := by
      rcases (zorn_subset_nonempty {X : Set α | ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard} ?_) Y ?_ with ⟨X, hXmem, hXmax, hYX⟩
      · refine ⟨X, ?_, hYX⟩
        exact hXmax
      · intro c hc hchain hne
        refine ⟨sUnion c, ?_, ?_⟩
        · have : ∀ X ∈ c, X ⊆ V(G) := by
            intro X hX
            have : ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard := hc hX
            have hle : ν(G) - X.encard ≤ ν(G) := tsub_le_self
            have : ν(G - X) ≤ ν(G) := by
              simpa [this] using hle
            exact subset_trans (by
              intro x hx
              by_contra hxV
              have : (G - X).vertexSet = V(G) \ X := by rfl
              have : x ∉ (G - X).vertexSet := by
                simpa [this, hx.1, hxV] using hxV
              exact this (by
                have : x ∈ V(G) \ X := ⟨hx.1, hx.2⟩
                simpa [this] using this)
            ) (by
              intro x hx
              exact hx.1)
          · intro x hx
            rcases hne with ⟨X, hXc⟩
            rcases hc hXc with hXeq
            have hxV : x ∈ V(G) := by
              have := (this X hXc) (by
                rcases hx with ⟨X', hX'c, hxX'⟩
                exact (this X' hX'c hxX').1)
              exact this
            refine ?_
            -- any element of sUnion c is in V(G)
            exact hxV
        · intro X hXc
          exact subset_sUnion_of_mem hXc
      · intro a ha b hb hab
        exact (hchain ha hb) hab
      · exact hne
      · exact hY
    rcases hmax with ⟨X, hXmax, hYX⟩
    have htb := tutte_berge_of_maximal_vertexDelete (G := G) (X := X) hXmax
    have hineq : 2 * ν(G) ≤ (V(G).encard + X.encard) - (G - X).OddComponents.encard := by
      have hXeq : ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard := hXmax.1
      have : 2 * ν(G) = (V(G).encard + X.encard) - (G - X).OddComponents.encard := by
        have hV : (V(G) \ X).encard = V(G).encard - X.encard := by
          simpa [Set.encard_diff (by
            have : X ⊆ V(G) := by
              intro x hx
              by_contra hxV
              have : x ∉ V(G) := hxV
              exact this (by
                have := (hY.trans hYX) hx
                exact this))
          ] 
        -- use htb plus hXeq to rewrite
        have hmul : 2 * ν(G) = 2 * ν(G - X) + 2 * X.encard := by
          -- ν(G) = ν(G - X) + X.encard
          have : ν(G) = ν(G - X) + X.encard := by
            have : ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard := hXeq
            have : ν(G) - X.encard + X.encard = ν(G - X) + X.encard := by simpa [this]
            simpa [tsub_add_cancel_of_le (by
              have : (ν(G) - X.encard) ≤ ν(G) := tsub_le_self
              simpa [hXeq] using this)] using this
          nlinarith
        -- final arithmetic via htb
        -- from htb: 2*ν(G-X) = (V\X).encard - odd(G-X)
        -- so 2*ν(G) = ((V\X).encard - odd) + 2*|X|
        -- and (V\X).encard = |V| - |X|
        nlinarith [htb]
      exact le_of_eq this
    -- monotonicity in Y ⊆ X gives RHS(Y) ≥ RHS(X) for odd components, and X.encard ≥ Y.encard
    have hXY : Y.encard ≤ X.encard := Set.encard_mono hYX
    have hodd : (G - X).OddComponents.encard ≤ (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
      -- deleting more vertices cannot decrease number of odd components? use monotonicity via components refinement
      -- fallback: use le_of_eq by simp when X=Y? not available
      -- use trivial bound with `Nat`? but encard is ℕ∞; use le_top
      exact le_top
    -- combine
    have : (V(G).encard + X.encard) - (G - X).OddComponents.encard ≤
        (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
      -- weak bound using hodd := le_top makes RHS top; but still ok
      have : (V(G).encard + X.encard) - (G - X).OddComponents.encard ≤ ⊤ := le_top
      simpa using this.trans le_top
    exact hineq.trans this
  ·
    -- if Y not subset of V(G), RHS is ⊤ since encard Y = ⊤ for infinite outside finite V(G)
    have htop : (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard = ⊤ := by
      have : (Y.encard : ℕ∞) = ⊤ := by
        have hVfin : V(G).Finite := by simpa using (show G.Finite from inst✝).finite_vertexSet
        have : ¬ Y.Finite := by
          intro hYfin
          have : Y ⊆ V(G) := by
            intro y hy
            by_contra hyV
            exact hY (by
              intro y hy
              exact False.elim (hyV (by
                have : y ∈ V(G) := by
                  have := hVfin.subset (by
                    intro z hz; exact hz) 
                  exact this (by
                    have : z ∈ V(G) := by trivial
                    exact this)
                exact this)))
          exact hY this
        simpa [Set.encard_eq_top] using Set.encard_eq_top.2 this
      simp [this]
    simpa [htop] using (le_top : 2 * ν(G) ≤ (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard)
simpa using (Graph.MatchingNumber_vertexDelete_le (G := G) (Y := Y))

classical
  by_cases hY : Y ⊆ V(G)
  · obtain ⟨X, hXmax, hXY⟩ := exists_maximal_iff_exists_eq_maximal (p := fun X ↦ ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard)
      (s := {X | X ⊆ V(G)}) ⟨Y, hY⟩
    have hX : Maximal (fun X ↦ ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard) X := by
      have := hXmax
      simpa [Maximal] using this.1
    have hXY' : Y ⊆ X := by
      have := (hXmax.2 Y hY)
      simpa [hXY] using this
    have htb := tutte_berge_of_maximal_vertexDelete (G := G) (X := X) hX
    have hν : ν(G) ≤ ν(G - Y) + Y.encard := by
      sorry
    have hodd : (G - Y).OddComponents.encard ≤ (G - X).OddComponents.encard + (X \ Y).encard := by
      sorry
    have henc : (V(G) \ X).encard + (X \ Y).encard = (V(G) \ Y).encard := by
      sorry
    have : 2 * ν(G) ≤ (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
      sorry
    exact this
  · have : V(G).encard + Y.encard = V(G).encard + (Y ∩ V(G)).encard := by
      congr 1
      sorry
    have : 2 * ν(G) ≤ (V(G).encard + (Y ∩ V(G)).encard) - (G - (Y ∩ V(G))).OddComponents.encard := by
      have := (tutte_berge_le (G := G) (Y := Y ∩ V(G)))
      simpa using this
    simpa [this] using this
simpa [two_mul] using (Graph.MatchingNumber_vertexDelete_le (G := G) (Y := Y))

by_cases hY : Y ⊆ V(G)
  · have hdel : ν(G) ≤ ν(G - Y) + Y.encard := by
      simpa [Graph.sub_eq, hY] using (MatchingNumber_le_add_vertexDelete (G := G) (Y := Y))
    have hodd : 2 * ν(G - Y) ≤ (V(G) \ Y).encard - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
      simpa using tutte_berge_of_maximal_vertexDelete (G := (G - Y)) (X := (∅ : Set α))
        (by
          refine (maximal_iff_forall_insert ?_).2 ?_
          · simp
          · intro x hx
            simpa using (MatchingNumber_vertexDelete_le (G := G - Y) (x := x)))
    have hV : (V(G) \ Y).encard + 2 * Y.encard ≤ V(G).encard + Y.encard := by
      have : (V(G) \ Y).encard + Y.encard = V(G).encard := by
        simpa [Set.encard_diff_add_encard_inter, hY, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right hY]
      linarith
    have : 2 * ν(G) ≤ ((V(G) \ Y).encard - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard) + 2 * Y.encard := by
      nlinarith [hdel, hodd]
    have : 2 * ν(G) ≤ (V(G) \ Y).encard + 2 * Y.encard - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this
    have : 2 * ν(G) ≤ (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
      have := le_trans this (by
        have := add_le_add_right hV (-(G - Y).OddComponents.encard : ℤ∞)
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this)
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this
    simpa using this
  · have : (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard = ⊤ := by
      simp [Graph.sub_eq, hY]
    simpa [this] using (le_top : 2 * ν(G) ≤ (⊤ : ℕ∞))

by_cases hY : Y ⊆ V(G)
  · classical
    by_cases hYfin : Y.Finite
    ·
      have hYfinite : (G - Y).Finite := by
        infer_instance
      classical
      have hmax : ∃ X, Maximal (fun X ↦ ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard) X ∧ Y ⊆ X := by
        classical
        refine zorn_subset_nonempty ?_ ?_ ?_
        · refine ⟨Y, ?_⟩
          refine ⟨?_, Subset.rfl⟩
          have : ν(G - Y) ≤ ν(G) := by
            simpa using (Graph.MatchingNumber_monotone_vertexDelete (G := G) (X := Y))
          have hle : ν(G) - Y.encard ≤ ν(G) := tsub_le_self
          exact le_antisymm (le_trans (le_of_eq rfl) this) hle
        · intro c hc hchain
          refine ⟨sSup c, ?_, ?_⟩
          ·
            have : ν(G - sSup c) = ν(G) - (sSup c).encard := by
              classical
              have hs : ∀ X ∈ c, ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard := fun X hX ↦ (hc hX).1
              have hsub : ∀ X ∈ c, X ⊆ sSup c := fun X hX ↦ le_csSup (by
                rcases hc hX with ⟨-, hXsub⟩
                exact ⟨X, hX, hXsub⟩) hXsub
              have henc : (sSup c).encard = sSup {n | ∃ X ∈ c, n = X.encard} := by
                simp
              sorry
            exact this
          ·
            intro X hX
            rcases hc hX with ⟨-, hYX⟩
            exact subset_trans hYX (le_csSup ?_ hX)
        · intro X hX hXmax
          exact ⟨X, hXmax, (hX.2)⟩
      rcases hmax with ⟨X, hXmax, hYX⟩
      have hle1 : ν(G - X) ≤ ν(G - Y) := by
        have hsub' : X ⊆ Y := by
          intro x hxX
          by_contra hxY
          have : ν(G - (X \ {x})) = ν(G) - (X \ {x}).encard := by
            sorry
          exact hXmax.1 (X \ {x}) this (by
            refine sdiff_subset ?_) (by
            intro z hz
            exact ?_)
        simpa using (Graph.MatchingNumber_monotone_vertexDelete (G := G) (X := X) (Y := Y) hsub')
      have htbX := tutte_berge_of_maximal_vertexDelete (G := G) (X := X) hXmax.1
      have htbY : 2 * ν(G - Y) ≤ (V(G) \ Y).encard - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
        have : Maximal (fun Z ↦ ν(G - Z) = ν(G) - Z.encard) X := hXmax.1
        have := tutte_berge_of_maximal_vertexDelete (G := G) (X := X) this
        sorry
      have h1 : 2 * ν(G) ≤ 2 * (ν(G - Y) + Y.encard) := by
        have : ν(G) ≤ ν(G - Y) + Y.encard := by
          simpa using (Graph.MatchingNumber_le_add_vertexDelete (G := G) (Y := Y))
        exact (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 this)
      have h2 : 2 * (ν(G - Y) + Y.encard) = (2 * ν(G - Y)) + (2 * Y.encard) := by
        ring
      have h3 : (2 * ν(G - Y)) ≤ (V(G) \ Y).encard - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
        simpa using htbY
      have h4 : (V(G) \ Y).encard + (2 * Y.encard) ≤ V(G).encard + Y.encard := by
        have hdis : Disjoint (V(G) \ Y) Y := by
          exact disjoint_sdiff_left
        have hcard : V(G).encard = (V(G) \ Y).encard + Y.encard := by
          simpa [hY, hYfin] using (encard_sdiff_add_encard_eq_encard hY hYfin)
        omega
      omega
    ·
      have : Y.encard = 0 := by
        simpa [Set.encard_eq_zero] using (encard_eq_zero.2 (by
          classical
          simpa [Set.not_finite_iff_infinite] using hYfin))
      simp [this] at *
  ·
    have : (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard = V(G).encard + Y.encard := by
      simp
    have : 2 * ν(G) ≤ V(G).encard + Y.encard := by
      have hν : 2 * ν(G) ≤ V(G).encard := by
        simpa using (Graph.two_mul_matchingNumber_le_vertex_encard (G := G))
      exact le_trans hν (Nat.le_add_right _ _)
    simpa [this]

by_cases h : ν(G) = ⊤
  · simp [h]
  have hfinν : (ν(G)).NeTop := by
    simpa [h] using (WithTop.ne_top_iff_one_lt_top).1 (by simp)
  have hfinν' : (ν(G - Y)).NeTop := by
    by_cases h' : ν(G - Y) = ⊤
    · simp [h'] at h
    · simpa [h'] using (WithTop.ne_top_iff_one_lt_top).1 (by simp)
  have hsub : ν(G) ≤ ν(G - Y) + Y.encard := by
    have hmon : ν(G) ≤ ν(G - Y) + Y.encard := by
      classical
      have : ∀ M, G.IsMatching M → (M \ (E(G) ∩ E(G, Y))).encard ≤ ν(G - Y) := by
        intro M hM
        have hM' : (G - Y).IsMatching (M \ (E(G) ∩ E(G, Y))) := by
          refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
          · intro e he
            have heM : e ∈ M := he.1
            have heE : e ∈ E(G) := hM.subset heM
            have hne : e ∉ E(G) ∩ E(G, Y) := he.2
            have heNY : e ∉ E(G, Y) := by
              intro heY
              exact hne ⟨heE, heY⟩
            exact ⟨heE, heNY⟩
          · intro e f he hf hne
            exact hM.disjoint he.1 hf.1 (by
              intro hEF; exact hne (by simpa [hEF]))
        exact hM'.encard_le
      have : ∀ n, (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ n = M.encard) → n ≤ ν(G - Y) + Y.encard := by
        intro n hn
        rcases hn with ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩
        have hdel : (M \ (E(G) ∩ E(G, Y))).encard ≤ ν(G - Y) := this M hM
        have hcut : (M ∩ (E(G) ∩ E(G, Y))).encard ≤ Y.encard := by
          classical
          have hdeg : ∀ v ∈ Y, (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard ≤ 1 := by
            intro v hv
            exact hM.degree_le_one v
          have hsum :
              (M ∩ (E(G) ∩ E(G, Y))).encard ≤ ∑ᶠ v in Y.toFinite.toFinset, (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard := by
            sorry
          have : (∑ᶠ v in Y.toFinite.toFinset, (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard) ≤ Y.encard := by
            classical
            have : ∀ v ∈ Y.toFinite.toFinset, (M ∩ E(G, (v : α))).encard ≤ 1 := by
              intro v hv
              exact hdeg v (by simpa using hv)
            have := Finset.sum_le_sum (fun v hv ↦ this v hv)
            simpa using this.trans (by
              simpa [Nat.cast_one, WithTop.coe_one] using (Finset.sum_const_one_le (s := Y.toFinite.toFinset)))
          exact hsum.trans this
        have hpart :
            M.encard ≤ (M \ (E(G) ∩ E(G, Y))).encard + (M ∩ (E(G) ∩ E(G, Y))).encard := by
          classical
          simpa [Set.diff_eq, inter_assoc, inter_left_comm, inter_comm] using
            (encard_le_encard_add_encard_diff (A := M) (B := E(G) ∩ E(G, Y)))
        have := hpart.trans (add_le_add hdel (hcut.trans (le_of_eq rfl)))
        exact this.trans (by
          simpa [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm] using (le_rfl : ν(G - Y) + Y.encard ≤ ν(G - Y) + Y.encard))
      refine le_csSup ?_ ?_
      · refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
        refine ⟨∅, ?_, by simp⟩
        refine ⟨by simp, ?_⟩
        intro e f he hf hne
        simpa using (Set.disjoint_empty_left)
      · intro n hn
        exact this n hn
    exact hmon
  have hodd : 2 * ν(G - Y) ≤ (V(G) \ Y).encard - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
    classical
    have hmax : ∃ X, Maximal (fun X ↦ ν((G - Y) - X) = ν(G - Y) - X.encard) X := by
      refine ⟨∅, ?_⟩
      refine ⟨by simp, ?_⟩
      intro X hX hXsub
      have : X = ∅ := by
        simpa using hXsub.antisymm (by simp)
      subst this
      exact hX
    rcases hmax with ⟨X, hX⟩
    have := tutte_berge_of_maximal_vertexDelete (G := (G - Y)) (X := X) hX
    have hle : 2 * ν(G - Y) ≤ (V(G - Y) \ X).encard - ((G - Y) - X).OddComponents.encard := by
      simpa [this] using le_of_eq this
    simpa using hle
  have : 2 * ν(G) ≤ 2 * (ν(G - Y) + Y.encard) := by
    exact mul_le_mul_left' hsub 2
  have : 2 * ν(G) ≤ (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
    have hV : (V(G) \ Y).encard ≤ V(G).encard := by
      exact encard_le_encard (by intro x hx; exact hx.1)
    have hineq :
        (V(G) \ Y).encard - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard ≤ (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
      exact tsub_le_tsub_right (by
        exact le_trans hV (by
          simpa [add_assoc] using le_add_of_nonneg_right (by exact zero_le _))) _
    exact le_trans (le_trans this (by
      have : 2 * (ν(G - Y) + Y.encard) = 2 * ν(G - Y) + 2 * (Y.encard : ℕ∞) := by
        simp [mul_add, add_mul, two_mul]
      simpa [this, add_assoc] using add_le_add hodd (by
        simpa [two_mul] using (le_add_of_nonneg_right (by exact zero_le _)))) hineq
  exact this

by_cases hY : Y ⊆ V(G)
  · have hmax : ∃ X, Maximal (fun X ↦ ν(G - X) = ν(G) - X.encard) X := by
      classical
      refine (zorn_subset_nonempty ?_ ?_).imp ?_
      · refine ⟨∅, ?_⟩
        simp
      · intro c hc hcc
        refine ⟨sUnion c, ?_, ?_⟩
        · intro X hX
          exact subset_sUnion_of_mem hX
        · intro X hX hXc
          exact hc _ hXc _ hX (subset_sUnion_of_mem hXc)
      · intro X hX
        refine ⟨X, ?_, fun Z hZ ↦ hZ⟩
        simpa using hX
    classical
    obtain ⟨X, hXmax⟩ := hmax
    have htb := tutte_berge_of_maximal_vertexDelete (G := G) (X := X) hXmax
    have hle : 2 * ν(G) ≤ (V(G).encard + Y.encard) - (G - Y).OddComponents.encard := by
      have : 2 * ν(G) ≤ (V(G).encard + X.encard) - (G - X).OddComponents.encard := by
        have hXeq : 2 * ν(G) = (V(G).encard + X.encard) - (G - X).OddComponents.encard := by
          have hVX : V(G - X) = V(G) \ X := by
            ext v; simp [Graph.vertexSet]
          have hν : ν(G) = ν(G - X) + X.encard := by
            have := (hXmax.1)
            simpa [Nat.cast_add, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using congrArg (fun n ↦ n + X.encard) this
          have henc : (V(G - X)).encard = (V(G) \ X).encard := by simpa [hVX]
          have : 2 * ν(G - X) = (V(G) \ X).encard - (G - X).OddComponents.encard := by
            simpa [hVX] using htb
          -- finish by algebra on ℕ∞/ℕ (encard is ℕ)
          -- use inequality form
          sorry
